titleStmt.title: SII 27.79: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 79. (A.R. No. 470 of 1928-29.) KULĀI, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Durgā-Paramēśvari temple.

The record registers a gift of land after purchase from Malapaseṭṭi, son of Padumaṇṇa-seṭṭi by Gōpīnātha and Kēśavanātha-sēnabōva, sons of Bāchappa-sēnabōva, for feeding six Brāhmaṇas in a feedinghouse attached to the temple of Durgādēvi of Chitrapura. The gift, made for the merit of their mother Lakshimidēvi, was received by Varadēndra-tīrtha-śrīpāda. It also seems to record gift of land to god Mañjunāthadēva. Nāgaṇṇa-oḍeya, son of Mādarasa-oḍeya is stated to have been governing Maṅgaḷūru-rājya, in the period.
It is dated Śaka 1326, Mēsha 1, Sunday. The given tithi corresponds to 1404 A.D., March 26, the weekday being Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāma
ra cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē
svastiśrī śakavaruṣa 1326 neya vartamāna tāraṇa saṁvatsarada
mēśamāsa prathamaneya Ādivāradalu śrīmanumahārājā
dhi rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra harihararāyara rājyābhyudaya
dalu rāyara nirūpadiṁ mādarasa Oḍeyara kumāra nāgaṁṇa
Oḍeyaru maṁgalūra rājyavanāḷutiru kāladalu bācappa
sēna bōvara makkaḷu gōpīnātha kēśavanātha sēna bōvara tāyigaḷu
lakṣumidēviyarige yiḍaṟuvaṁtāgi citrapurada puḷipina
dēvālyadalu Āṟumaṁdi brāhmaṇabhōjanada chatrakke naḍava
bhūmiyastaḷada vivara padumaṁṇa seṭiya maga malapa seṭṭiya
kayyalu va 86 koṭu dhārāpūrvakavāgi koṁḍadatti hariya
rti Uḷu koḷuva bhūmiyalu bayalu bittu bidekārumū 50 bi
ttu bidekāru mū 25 ṇa huṇiyaṁda goṟasimū
ru bittuva mū 12 Aṁtu bayalu biḍumogaru sahabittu be
dekāru mu 18 kuḷakari marapaḍi tōṭa Ā kṣētradalu yidda
mūḍe kadirutuṁbi lōkisaha yidharṁmmakke Alli bahagēṇiya
batada bāḷu ga yi stānadalu muṁna bācapa sēnabōva
Āṟumaṁdige brāṁhmaṇabhōjanake varuśa 1 ke naḍavadu bha
tamū 80 vecake mārapalagēṇi ga 36 mataṁ lakṣumidēviya
ra hesaralu māḍida dharṁma Āṟumaṁdi brāṁhaṇa bhōjana
130 bhatamūḍe Þ0 mēlu vecakke
ga 36 Ubhayaṁ śāsana 2 ṟoḷage brāṁhmara
bhōjanake Uḷu diṁ varuśa 1 ke bhata kaṁcina hā 15 lekadalu
chatamū vecake marapala gēṇiyiṁ ga 72 hoṁnu
bhattamū 25 maṁjunātha dēvarige bhattamū
ḍe 12 bhaṁ ttamu 210 Ubhayaṁ sīme bhattamū 247 nū
dharṁmma migilādadanū mūliganū bhōgisi baharu
ya bhūmiyoḷage Arasiṁge sidhāya bi
ya bhūmige naṭṭu biḍudu ba Osage bi beya Ene
yella sarvvamāṁnya yidharṁmavanu Avanānobanu tapidanā
daḍe Arasiṁge tapidātana talesāvirada yiṁnūṟu hoṁnu da
ṁḍa Arasu tappidaḍe vāraṇāsiyalu sāvira kavileyanu sāvi
ra maṁdi brāṁhmarakoṁda dōśa yi dharṁmava pālsidavarige saka
ryaru gaḷa ha śrīpādaṁgaḷa śiśyaru varadēṁdratīrtha śrī
pādaṁgaḷu citrapurada durggādēviya dēvālyadalu yidharṁma
vanū naḍasuvarū . dāna pālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnu pālanāt dānāt
sarggamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . sāmāṁnyōyaṁ dharṁma sē
tuṁ nrupāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvāṁ nētāṁ nbhā
vinaḥ pārthivēṁdrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdra
śrī maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
